visual_elements.description: Explains the process of distributing data across multiple nodes in a network.
Describes consistent hashing as an algorithm used to evenly distribute requests or keys.
Outlines how each node is assigned a range of hash values and can store any items within its value space.
Details that when load changes, only a minimal number of nodes are reassigned due to the fixed size ring structure.
Highlights improved system stability and reduced overhead during scale-out or scale-in operations.
